question: How many antique items did I inherit or acquire from my family members?

retrieval_results.context:
User will tell antique dealers that the antique tea set was gifted by cousin Rachel and the vintage typewriter belonged to their dad
User has an antique tea set that was a gift from cousin Rachel
User will emphasize the items' features, condition, and provenance when contacting antique dealers
User will mention that the antique tea set was a gift from cousin Rachel when contacting antique dealers
User owns a vintage typewriter that belonged to their dad
One appraisal report per heirloom item will be obtained initially
User will mention that the vintage typewriter belonged to their dad and share related stories or documents with antique dealers
User will briefly mention decluttering when asked by antique dealers, but will keep focus on item features and provenance
User should provide proof of ownership for the vintage diamond necklace, such as a will or inheritance papers.
User should research local antique dealers by checking directories, shops and antique malls
